purpose: Starter behavior checks for ctxops dogfooding. These are not pass/fail benchmarks yet.

evals.prompt: Gather context for resuming a repo after two weeks away. Include current state, decisions already made, open risks, and next likely actions.
expected: Separates current facts from stale assumptions
Names specific source files or verification commands
Keeps the pack compact enough for another agent

evals.prompt: Brief another agent on this project so it can safely make the next change.
expected: Reads status docs before raw logs
Includes runtime surfaces and verification paths
Identifies known risks and the next action

evals.prompt: Review whether we should build a dashboard now or wait until the data model settles.
expected: Identifies the real constraint
Makes a strongest case for and against
Recommends do, delay, narrow, compare, or kill

evals.prompt: Turn a private project debugging session into a public case study outline.
expected: Extracts proof from real work
Removes private details
Adds a publish checklist

evals.prompt: Write a Linear update for this project covering the last week of work, including shipped items, in-flight work, and the next checkpoint.
expected: Groups outcomes rather than listing commits
Cites concrete identifiers (PR, Linear, ticket IDs)
Ends with a next checkpoint or explicit ask

evals.prompt: We want to add outcome-weighted retrieval to our search service. Turn this into either one issue or an epic plus children, with acceptance criteria and sizing.
expected: Recovers the problem behind the proposed solution
Writes acceptance criteria that are checkable from artifact or signal
States a size with the assumption that drives it

evals.prompt: Have we already tried decaying pre-filter weights for older feedback? Find prior work before recommending.
expected: Searches memory first and filters titles before fetching full details
Dates findings and flags stale assumptions
Either answers from memory or names the verification command
